'''''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #49''' was distributed in [[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo Town]] by the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] sometime in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="HNN">[[HoloNet News (original website)|''HoloNet News'' website]] "CoCo District Edition"</ref>

==Contents==
*'''NEWS''':
**Palpatine forms Loyalist Committee
**Alderaan Opens to Refugee Relief Movement
**Senator Dod in Five-Speeder Skylane Accident
**Sluis Sector Secedes; Seswenna Restates Loyalty
**Weequay/Houk Arraignment End in Violence

*'''BUSINESS''':
**House of Tagge Sides with Loyalists
**Biscuit Baron to Celebrate "Heroes of the Republic"

*'''REGIONAL''':
**Andoan Free Colonies Criticize Aqualish Separatists
**Missing Starship Search Abandoned

*'''JEDI WATCH''':
**Jedi Smash Iridium Pirates; 3 Knights Killed
**Sepan Civil War Escalates

*'''SPORTS''':
**Podracing Faces Uncertain Future

*'''LIFE''':
**SPECIAL REPORT: The Death Stick Scourge
**Area Woman Finds Sith Icon in Pastebread
**Baby Ludi Feature Slated for this Fall
**Study: Pollution Standards Still Endanger Many

*'''SIDEBARS''':
**A Closer Look: Most Popular Baby Names
***[[Losibaru]]
***[[Janara (name)|Janara]]
***[[Barada (name)|Barada]]
***[[Gaeriel]]
***[[(Sharp keening at 85 cycles, followed by five atonal mandible clicks)]]

==Release and reception==
Written from an [[in-universe]] perspective, ''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #49'' was one of many [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issues published shortly before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. This issue was released [[March 28]], [[2002]].
